name: BooPixel-boopixel-strategy
description: Internal skills for BooPixel business operations: database management, project tracking and automation

plugins.name: boopixel-db
plugins.description: Manipulate BooPixel production database (MySQL): query, update, insert, delete projects, charges, customers, subscriptions, transactions, leads

plugins.name: boopixel-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy BooPixel business-api (AWS SAM) and business-frontend (AWS Amplify, branches develop/master) to dev or prod

plugins.name: hostinger
plugins.description: Manage Hostinger account via API: websites, domains, DNS, billing, subscriptions, VPS, Docker, email marketing
